creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
The best place to stay in Bangkok? 👇  This is not a sponsored video - my whole deal as a travel blogger is to share honest opinions on destinations & hotels I visit 🤓 

DM me or comment “Bangkok hotel” and I’ll send you a link to the hotel 🤝  But I was honestly very impressed with the Eastin Grand Hotel Phayathai in the city centre of Bangkok and I can’t really complain about anything 😅  The staff was fantastic all the way through, and we could use the gym and pool area after we’d checked out (we had a late flight back to Europe).   There are a few shops and cafés adjacent to the hotel building and as mentioned you can also walk directly from the hotel to the train station which is nice in the sweltering heat in Bangkok 😅  I stayed in a Superior Panorama room with an amazing view and I paid $167 / €157 per night for 2 people including breakfast 💸  Is this the best hotel in Bangkok? Share your Bangkok hotel experiences in a comment & help fellow travellers 🤝  #bangkok #thailandtravel #bangkokhotel

transcription.text: If you're ever thinking about going to Thailand you need to see this new hotel in Bangkok and wait until you see their insane Breakfast buffet as you know I'm a sucker for swimming pools And this place has got two of the best infinity pools I've ever been to the main one has a restaurant and a bar and the top one has a more calm Atmosphere the hotel has its own walkway out to Paya Thai station So it's easy to get anywhere in Bangkok And you can also get the airport express train from here breakfast buffet is probably the craziest I've ever experienced anywhere They had sushi Western style salads hot Thai food And I also had to break my own rule of not going for hotel breakfast baked goods because these just looked so good and they were
